author: Marie-Laure Thuret
subject: v4.1.1
body: ## [4.1.1](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.1.0...v4.1.1) (2017-09-13) ### Bug Fixes * **MultiIndex:** reset page to 1 when share widgets refine (algolia/react-instantsearch#312) ([4a3a2b1](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/4a3a2b1)) * **MultiIndex:** Trigger new search when `` props are updated (algolia/react-instantsearch#318) ([3ea18b9](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/3ea18b9))
